steps.title: Link the sentence to testing
steps.content: The women test trees to see whether sap will appear. The underlined sentence explains why the testing matters: individual trees differ, with some ready to yield sap and others more reluctant.

steps.title: Keep focus on the trees
steps.content: Choice A shifts to the women's personalities. Choice B broadens to a human-tree relationship, and Choice C shifts to how nature affects human behavior. The remaining choice describes how the sentence elaborates on the tree trait being evaluated. The answer is D.
